executives.name: Jonathan Goodman
executives.background: Mr. Goodman is the Executive Chair of the Board. He has over 30 years of experience in the resource and investment sectors. He is also the President and CEO of Dundee Corporation.

executives.name: Juliana Lam
executives.background: Ms. Lam is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 30 years of experience in financial management and corporate strategy across various industries.

executives.name: Louis-Pierre Gignac
executives.background: Mr. Gignac is the President and CEO of G Mining Ventures Corp. and has over 20 years of experience in the mining industry. He holds a degree in mining engineering from McGill University and an MBA from HEC Montreal.

executives.name: Sybil Veenman
executives.background: Ms. Veenman was Senior Vice President and General Counsel of Barrick Gold Corporation.
